programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: This episode is all about Cuban favorites that are near and dear to Bren's heart. First, it's juicy and tender pork chops with mojo sauce that's packed with flavor, served with Plantain Fu-Fu that makes the meal filling and complete.

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: On this episode, it's super simple appetizers and drinks perfect for any party. She starts with Taro Root Fritters and a Cotton Candy Martini. Then it's her twist on guacamole with grilled pineapples, served with a smokey whisky sour.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: Jake and Jazz transform a bedroom to a relaxing guest retreat. Jake makes a headboard from a door he buys at a thrift shop and Jazz adds calming, colors & textures. The reveal meal is Fried Rice with Tempura Seafood, and Ginger Shortbread Cookies.

programme.title: Living by Design
programme.desc: In this episode, Jake taps into the family's love of nature and builds a live edge coffee table, and Jazz accents the room in warm cozy earth tone colors. The reveal meal is ramen with fish cakes, and a delicious triple chocolate cake.

programme.title: Global Gourmet
programme.desc: Essie loves good cocktails, but she always wants to make sure there's good finger food to go along with the drinks. Her must have cocktail and food on this episode is a smooth and delicious Hibiscus drink served with her yummy Ghanaian Meat Pies.

programme.title: Global Gourmet
programme.desc: If you like seafood, then you will love what Essie is cooking up in this episode. It's prawns in a Mango Coconut Chili Curry Sauce and a Creamy Pasta with Clams, Scallops, and Shrimp. Delicious, comfy, cozy, and saucy!

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: This episode Bren celebrates brunch Atlanta and DC style. She starts out with a lavender egg white martini. Then it's Bren's version of chicken and waffles with maple bourbon syrup.

programme.title: Culture Kitchen
programme.desc: This episode is all about food on the lighter side, but packed with flavor. We kick things off with blackened grilled shrimp salad with pickled onions, tomato jam & blue cheese. Then it's southern style collard greens made with smoked turkey.
